name: calypso-swarm
description: AI-orchestrated Stellar DeFi market simulation — paid via x402 USDC micropayments.

scripts.dev:api: pnpm --filter @calypso/shared run build && pnpm --filter @calypso/api run dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter @calypso/shared run build && pnpm --filter @calypso/web run dev
scripts.kill: pkill -f 'tsx.*calypso' 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:9990 -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'all calypso processes killed'
